_readme: Held-out retrieval eval set: one question per routable document (14 total). LOCKED BEFORE the first eval run (2026-07-06) and not edited afterward -- expected_phrase values were verified to exist verbatim in each document's first-2-page text (the retrieval corpus) during set construction, but no retrieval was run until the set was frozen. expected_phrase is scored against the top-1 retrieved chunk with eval.scoring.is_match (fuzzy window match, threshold 0.75). Questions are phrased naturally and are NOT designed to avoid known system weaknesses (e.g. reading-order-displaced bullet content in LIPITOR/IBRANCE/PAXLOVID/XELJANZ HIGHLIGHTS chunks) -- failures those cause are real findings, not eval bugs.

questions.question: What is the boxed warning for CHANTIX about?
questions.expected_phrase: Serious neuropsychiatric events have been reported in patients taking CHANTIX

questions.question: What is the boxed warning for XELJANZ about?
What is the recommended dosage for PREVNAR 20?
questions.expected_phrase: single dose in adults 18 years of age and older

questions.question: What is the boxed warning for ELIQUIS about?
questions.expected_phrase: Epidural or spinal hematomas may occur in patients treated with ELIQUIS

questions.question: What are the contraindications for NORVASC?
What is the recommended dosage for ZOLOFT?
What is the boxed warning for DEPO-PROVERA about?
questions.expected_phrase: may lose significant bone mineral density

questions.question: What are the drug interactions for VIAGRA?
questions.expected_phrase: potentiate the hypotensive effects of nitrates

questions.question: What is the boxed warning for PAXLOVID about?
questions.expected_phrase: strong CYP3A inhibitor, which may lead to greater exposure

questions.question: What is NURTEC ODT used for?
questions.expected_phrase: acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults
